title: Data Sources
description: The Data Sources module allows administrators and data engineers to register, configure, and monitor the clinical data sources connected to the Parthenon platform. It provides visibility into source database connections, CDM version compatibility, and ingestion job status.
tips: Verify CDM version compatibility when registering a new data source to ensure all analytical modules function correctly against it.
Use the Source Profiler to assess the structure and content of a newly connected data source before initiating full ingestion.
Monitor ingestion job status through the Jobs Monitoring panel to detect and resolve pipeline failures promptly.
Assign appropriate access controls to each data source to restrict visibility to authorized research teams.
Document the provenance, refresh cadence, and known limitations of each data source to support transparent research reporting.
